name: Mrs. f Nutty White Chunk Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. In a medium bowl, combine flour, baking soda, and salt. Mix well; set aside.
3. In a large bowl, using a mixer, blend sugars at medium speed until smooth.
4. Add butter; mix until a grainy paste forms.
5. Add eggs and vanilla; beat until light and fluffy.
6. Gradually add the flour mixture, pecans, and white chocolate; blend on low until just combined.
7. Do not overmix.
8. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough onto ungreased cookie sheets, 2 inches apart.
9. Bake for 20-22 minutes or until edges begin to turn golden brown.
10. Do not overbake.
11. Transfer cookies to a cool flat surface to cool before removing from the cookie sheets.
